meaning: n.跳进,投入vi.投入,跳进,陷入vt.使投入,使插入,使陷入
examples: The company is planning a deeper plunge into the commercial market.
He took the plunge into the deep end.
So, when WPSX took the plunge into SFNs, it opted for option two, distributed transmission.
Meka and I made our way down to the water and prepared ourselves for a refreshing plunge.
